attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.SET_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.SET_NAME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.SHIPPING_PREFERENCE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.DIST_CENTER_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.FPM_CODE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.DUTY_ATTRIBUTE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.CARRIER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.MOVE_OVERRIDE_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.EARLY_SHIPMENT_ALLOWED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE16, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE17, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE18, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE19, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.ATTRIBUTE20, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT,
 (
 select SET_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT
 minus
 select SET_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SET_ID = STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.SET_ID  and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_SETS_EXT.REFRESH_DATETIME
